title: Strobilanthes apoensis

The Acanthaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Strobilanthes apoensis belonging to the subfamily Acanthoideae. Within the Acanthoideae subfamily, Strobilanthes apoensis is likely to be part of a tribe such as Ruinae or Justicieae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and fever, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
